{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211324226999B304477734CE27F5"}"},"total":22},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353357903498593078","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的写作风格很独特，文笔简洁而有力，让人在阅读时感到紧张和刺激。里面的故事都很吸引人，我特别喜欢那个关于鬼手的故事，情节跌宕起伏，让人毛骨悚然。而且作者对恐怖氛围的营造非常到位，让我感觉就像身临其境一样。总的来说，这是一本很精彩的恐怖小说，推荐给喜欢恐怖故事的朋友们。","text_exts":[{"e":121,"s":117,"text":"恐怖小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407066234CE27F5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227353357903498593078%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227316457029457955902%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":131,"s":127,"text":"恐怖故事","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407066234CE27F5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227353357903498593078%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227316457029457955902%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709522526,"group_id":"7316457029457955902","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8Ow6HYP4eF8NUBec+QC7b7327SR/1Ayk7kXEfEToBU/","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gen
